rationale: The Iran-US deal remains unresolved — if concluded, it could shift US attention and resources away from Ukraine support; Israel-Lebanon strikes show the deal is fragile, keeping Ukrainian strategic uncertainty elevated.

top_events.title: Iran claims US deal near but 'lots can still go wrong'; Israel strikes Lebanon
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal could redirect American diplomatic and military focus away from Ukraine. Continued uncertainty and Lebanon strikes suggest the deal is not imminent, keeping Western support baseline unchanged.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI suspended for foreign nationals by US order
top_events.summary: US restricts AI tool access for non-US users including Ukrainians; minor practical impact on Ukrainian digital infrastructure and civil society tools.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic for espionage
top_events.summary: Rising US-China tensions could have indirect implications for global alliance dynamics relevant to Ukraine, but no direct impact this cycle.
